pattern: A linear DP tracks how many subsequences end in each stage (a block of 0s, then 1s, then 2s) updating counts modulo 1e9+7.
hints: Think in three stages: subsequences consisting only of 0s, of 0s-then-1s, and of 0s-then-1s-then-2s.
Maintain counts c0, c1, c2 for subsequences currently ending in each stage as you scan the array.
On a 0: c0 = 2*c0 + 1. On a 1: c1 = 2*c1 + c0. On a 2: c2 = 2*c2 + c1. Take everything modulo 1e9+7 and return c2.

edge_inputs.description: three special subsequences from a small array
single element cannot form a special subsequence
all zeros, never reaches a two
